title: Tinkers' ManaitaMTK
description: A bridge between ManaitaMTK and TiC, enhancing Manaita's gameplay with TiC's modifiers.
body: # Tinkers' ManaitaMTK --- This mod is a bridge mod between Tinkers' Construct and ManaitaMTK (a classic low-cost item duper and OP tools), adding a material called "MTK (Manaita)" that can be used in TiC. Using this material, you can use Manaita specs and functions with TiC tools and armor. This is designed to enhance Manaita gameplay with TiC modifiers. ![overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cb464071d014148c9f5b555f9de74c91207c414.png) ## Note - This mod significantly disrupts the game balance of Tinkers' Construct and Minecraft. However, please note that this is because the mod is made for a niche group of players who enjoy a completely unbalanced dystopian world, and does not mean that it disrespects the game balance of Tinkers' Construct or Minecraft. - This mod is distributed with permission from takoyaki3466, having been taken over from mochi-753.
